title: End of MP Eva Battle
wikitext:
[]: End of MP Eva Battle Post by schismatics » Tue Jul 14, 2009 11:59 am So does anyone have any clue where the the Lance that pwnd Asuka came from? I mean all the MP Evas are pretty much knocked out and it just flies out of nowhere...watched EoE again yesterday and I just noticed that. Any ideas?

[]: Post by BattleMonkey » Tue Jul 14, 2009 12:01 pm Stuffs just attracted to her eye naturally....

[]: Post by DanteNeverCry » Tue Jul 14, 2009 12:09 pm It was thrown by Chuck Norris

[]: Post by Sammaeloo » Tue Jul 14, 2009 12:23 pm Pen^2 hurled it at her with his SPP (satanic penguin powers).

[]: Post by master_lloyd » Tue Jul 14, 2009 12:39 pm Silliness aside see here: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=2063&postdays=0&postorder=asc&start=20 and here: http://web.archive.org/web/20021219221434/www.evaotaku.com/omake/mpEvas.html EDIT: Also INB4 "the butler did it!"

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Jul 14, 2009 12:40 pm http://web.archive.org/web/20021219221434/www.evaotaku.com/omake/mpEvas.html This is what you seek.

[]: Post by master_lloyd » Tue Jul 14, 2009 12:40 pm Beatcha!

[]: Post by schismatics » Tue Jul 14, 2009 1:16 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: http://web.archive.org/web/20021219221434/www.evaotaku.com/omake/mpEvas.html This is what you seek.

[]: Post by Reichu » Tue Jul 14, 2009 4:47 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: http://web.archive.org/web/20021219221434/www.evaotaku.com/omake/mpEvas.html This is what you seek.
